steps: Enrich with CVE details (CVSS score, description, affected versions)
Assess exploitability (public exploits, ease of exploitation)
Determine business impact (affected systems, data sensitivity)
Calculate risk score (CVSS × business impact × exploitability)
quality_gates: All vulnerabilities enriched with CVE data

steps: Follow the skill procedure in SKILL.md body.
